title: Root Full Year 2024 Earnings: Beats Expectations
text: Root Insurance exceeded market expectations in its full-year 2024 financial results. The company demonstrated remarkable growth, with revenue reaching $1.18 billion, a substantial 159% increase from the prior year. The insurer achieved profitability after previously posting losses. Net income totaled $29.2 million compared to a $147.4 million loss in 2023. The profit margin improved to 2.5%, driven primarily by higher revenue generation. Earnings per share came in at $1.96, a dramatic turnaround from the prior year's $10.24 loss per share. Root's performance surpassed analyst predictions on both revenue and earnings metrics. Revenue beat estimates by 3.6%, with analysts particularly impressed by the earnings surprise. The company's stock price responded positively, climbing 11% over the preceding week. Looking forward, analysts project Root will achieve 11% annual revenue growth over the next three years, outpacing the broader U.S. insurance industry's forecasted 5.2% annual growth rate. However, investors should note that research identified 2 warning signs for Root according to the analysis, with one being particularly significant for prospective shareholders.
